Jon: Jon (D1:6, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me. [D1:6]

=== Session 1 (4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D1:17, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment! [D1:17]
Jon: Jon (D1:18, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing? [D1:18]
Gina: Gina (D1:15, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Wow! What did you get? [D1:15]
Jon: Jon (D1:16, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows? [D1:16]
Gina: Gina (D1:19, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful. [D1:19]

=== Session 2 (2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D2:3, 2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023): Thanks a bunch! It's awesome seeing my vision happen. How's the dance studio going? Did you find the right spot? [D2:3]
Jon: Jon (D2:8, 2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023): Yeah, good flooring's crucial. I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean. [D2:8]

It's awesome to see it all coming together! You, Jon? What do you have going for your dance studio? [D8:12]

Gina: Gina (D1:7, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles? [D1:7]

=== Session 2 (2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023) ===
Jon: Jon (D2:4, 2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023): Hey Gina! Thanks for asking. I'm on the hunt for the ideal spot for my dance studio and it's been quite a journey! I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool. [D2:4]
Gina: Gina (D2:7, 2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023): Definitely! Dance floors help avoid injuries and make dancing more enjoyable. You thinking about it is great. Any particular type of flooring you like? [D2:7]

=== Session 4 (10:43 am on 4 February, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D4:10, 10:43 am on 4 February, 2023): Searching for the perfect dance studio's a tough job, Jon. Hang in there and you'll find it soon! [D4:10]

=== Session 7 (7:28 pm on 23 March, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D7:6, 7:28 pm on 23 March, 2023): Thanks for the advice, Jon! Building relationships and creating a strong brand image for my store is something I'm always working on. You're right, staying positive is key. What helps you stay motivated with your dance studio business? [D7:6]

=== Session 8 (1:26 pm on 3 April, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D8:12, 1:26 pm on 3 April, 2023): Yeah, I have a few plans. I'm thinking of working with some fashion bloggers and influencers in the next few months to get more attention for my store. Plus, I'm going to do more ads so I can reach more people. I'm really focused on building my customer base and making my store a top destination for fashion fans. It's awesome to see it all coming together! You, Jon? What do you have going for your dance studio? [D8:12]

=== Session 11 (3:14 pm on 11 May, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D11:6, 3:14 pm on 11 May, 2023): Gotcha, Jon! Dance is my stress fix too. As soon as I start, all my worries vanish. It's amazing what we can do for our own mental health with something we enjoy. [D11:6]

=== Session 12 (7:18 pm on 27 May, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D12:7, 7:18 pm on 27 May, 2023): It sounds great! Could it spark any ideas for your dance studio? [D12:7]

=== Session 13 (8:29 pm on 13 June, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D13:4, 8:29 pm on 13 June, 2023): Proud of you for starting your own business! It takes strength to stay hopeful. What are you doing to prep for your dance studio? I have developed a video presentation to teach how to style my fashion pieces, btw. [D13:4]

=== Session 18 (5:44 pm on 21 July, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D18:1, 5:44 pm on 21 July, 2023): Hey Jon! Long time no talk! Last week, I built a new website for customers to make orders. It's been a wild ride but I'm loving it. What's up with you? === Session 8 (1:26 pm on 3 April, 2023) ===

=== Session 13 (8:29 pm on 13 June, 2023) ===
Gina: Gina (D13:4, 8:29 pm on 13 June, 2023): Proud of you for starting your own business! It takes strength to stay hopeful. What are you doing to prep for your dance studio? I have developed a video presentation to teach how to style my fashion pieces, btw. [D13:4]

memory_snapshot_final.text: Gina (D1:1, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?

memory_snapshot_final.text: Jon (D1:2, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
memory_snapshot_final.speaker: Jon

memory_snapshot_final.text: Gina (D1:3, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?

memory_snapshot_final.text: Jon (D1:4, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.

memory_snapshot_final.text: Gina (D1:5, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?

memory_snapshot_final.text: Jon (D1:6, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.

memory_snapshot_final.speaker: Jon

memory_snapshot_final.text: Gina (D1:9, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.

memory_snapshot_final.text: Jon (D1:10, 4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023): Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
